title: Record final provider rate-limit cooldowns
goal: Ensure retryable provider rate-limit errors update the shared cooldown governor even on the final failed retry, so the next request does not immediately stampede into the same limit.
completionConditions: OpenAI records provider rate-limit cooldown before checking whether retry attempts remain.
Anthropic records provider rate-limit cooldown before checking whether retry attempts remain.
OpenRouter records provider rate-limit cooldown before checking whether retry attempts remain.
Focused tests, cargo check, selfdev build/reload, governance, commit and push pass.
notes: Follow-up to issue #27. Keep scope to OpenAI, Anthropic, and OpenRouter, which currently use the shared provider cooldown governor.
